data.title: John and Mable Ringling Museum of Art and FSU celebrate 25 years of partnership and stewardship, leading to major restoration and record public engagement.
data.description: Over the past 25 years, FSU governance has spearheaded significant efforts in restoring and expanding operations, resulting in unprecedented levels of public involvement. Located in Sarasota and Tallahassee, Florida, as of January 15, 2026, The Ringling, which serves as the State Art Museum of Florida, has experienced remarkable growth and restoration under FSU's management.

data.title: RealNex and CRE Marketing Hub join forces to advance AI innovation in commercial real estate, aiming for industry growth.
data.description: In Stafford, Texas on January 15, 2026, RealNex, a prominent provider of commercial real estate technology solutions, revealed a new strategic partnership with CRE Marketing Hub. This platform is known for its innovative use of AI to enhance marketing efforts and productivity in the commercial real estate sector. This announcement marks a significant development in the industry as these two companies come together to leverage their expertise and technology.

data.title: AFCPE announces 2025 award recipients for financial education, research, and practice at their symposium in Phoenix–Glendale.
data.description: In January 15, 2026, in Westerville, Ohio, the Association for Financial Counseling and Planning Education® (AFCPE®) celebrated exceptional individuals and initiatives at the 2025 AFCPE Symposium, which took place from November 18 to 20 in Phoenix–Glendale, Arizona. This event acknowledged noteworthy contributions in the financial sector through prestigious awards.

data.title: WorkCompCollege.com partners with Montana State Fund for 10 years to provide professional development platform.
data.description: In Lakewood Ranch, Florida, on January 15, 2026, WorkCompCollege.com, a division of Workers' Compensation Educational Services, LLC, revealed a significant collaboration with Montana State Fund. The agreement spans over a decade and focuses on providing a tailored professional growth platform.

data.title: New Zealand's Crossware acquires Germany's CI Solutions GmbH in multimillion-dollar deal for European expansion.
data.description: In a significant move to expand its footprint in the European Union (EU), the top email signature provider, Crossware, based in Auckland, New Zealand, has successfully completed the acquisition of CI Solutions GmbH, a company headquartered in Germany. The multimillion-dollar acquisition marks a strategic effort by Crossware to strengthen its position in the EU market. Crossware's acquisition of CI Solutions GmbH represents a crucial step in their growth strategy, with a focus on further establishing their presence in Europe.

data.title: Virtual filmmaking workshop by Butterfly Noir Inc. offers emerging filmmakers 6-week crash course with tools, strategies, and on-set experience using minimal resources.
data.description: A non-profit arts organization, Butterfly Noir Inc., based in New York, is offering a six-week crash course aimed at providing emerging filmmakers with essential tools, strategies, and hands-on experience on set. The program aims to equip participants with skills to work with minimal resources. This initiative comes as part of the organization's efforts to bridge the opportunity gap for artists. The course, starting on January 15, 2026, will provide valuable industry knowledge and practical experience to aspiring filmmakers.

data.title: New Venture Escrow expands into Los Angeles, California, marking its presence in the state's largest market.
data.description: In Los Angeles, California, on January 15, 2026, New Venture Escrow, a prominent independent escrow company known for its agent-focused approach and innovative technology, revealed the launch of its latest office. This expansion in Los Angeles is led by a seasoned team with a strong focus on providing excellent service.
Fed's Goolsbee: Growth is solid.

data.title: Dionis, a 40-year goat milk skincare leader, launches 7 new products including Body Butter collection.
data.description: In Bucks County, Pennsylvania, on January 15, 2026, Dionis Goat Milk Skincare, a well-established clean beauty brand known for its expertise in goat milk-based products for over 40 years, has announced the launch of seven new products. The expansion includes additions to their product line such as the Goat Milk Body Butter collection and a new "Freshly..." line. This brings the total number of SKUs offered by the brand to a diverse range of options for consumers.

data.title: Lone Star sells SENQCIA to Noritsu Koki for $519 million, a leading mission-critical building products provider in Japan.
data.description: Lone Star Funds revealed today that one of its affiliates, Lone Star Fund XI, L.P., has agreed to sell SENQCIA Corporation to Noritsu Koki Co., Ltd. for around $519 million. SENQCIA, based in Tokyo, is a prominent supplier of vital building products and solutions in Japan. This transaction signifies a significant move in the business world involving key players from Dallas, New York, London, and Tokyo. SENQCIA specializes in the development, design, and distribution of crucial construction components.

data.title: Choice Properties REIT declared $0.064167 cash distribution per trust unit for Jan 2026, $0.77 annualized, payable on Feb 17.
data.description: In Toronto, Choice Properties Real Estate Investment Trust (TSX: CHP.UN) made public the declaration of a cash distribution for January 2026. The trustees announced a payment of $0.064167 per trust unit, equivalent to $0.77 per trust unit annually. This amount is scheduled to be disbursed on February 17, 2026, to Unitholders recorded as of January 30, 2026. Choice Properties, a prominent real estate investment trust, continues to be a key player in the industry.

data.title: Manor Park Ventures prepares for next multifamily cycle post supply expansion, focusing on disciplined development and pricing power.
data.description: On January 15, 2026, in New York, the U.S. multifamily sector is shifting away from a record supply surge towards a new stage marked by limited development opportunities, careful capital investment, and increased ability to set prices. Moving into 2026, Manor...

data.title: High Roller Technologies partners with Lines.com to boost marketing for U.S. Prediction Markets launch, signs LOI, enhancing strategy.
data.description: A recent partnership has boosted the marketing strategy ahead of the upcoming launch of a newly revealed entry into Prediction Markets. This move signifies a significant step in the preparation for the launch. The collaboration aims to enhance visibility and reach of the product to a wider audience. The entry into Prediction Markets has garnered attention, with anticipation building as the launch date approaches. This development comes at a crucial time, with high expectations set for the new venture. The partnership is set to amplify the marketing efforts to ensure a successful introduction to the market.

data.title: 1 in 3 Americans plan to gift beauty products this holiday season, highlighting the thriving beauty industry in America.
data.description: This holiday season, the beauty industry is a focal point with self-care taking the spotlight. Recent data from Fort Lauderdale, Florida reveals that in America, one out of every three individuals intends to give beauty products as gifts, emphasizing the industry's success. The importance of self-care in maintaining well-being is apparent, and this trend is evident in the upcoming Christmas festivities.

data.title: Winnow nominated for Legalweek Awards for the fourth time in a row as a leader in legal AI innovation.  #ComplianceTech #LegalTech #LegalAI
data.description: A company specializing in compliance technology has been acknowledged for their outstanding innovation in legal artificial intelligence. Winnow, based in Anaheim, California, has received their fourth consecutive nomination at the 2026 Legalweek event. This recognition highlights their expertise in regulatory compliance and legal technology.

data.title: TechAssure strengthens Latin American presence by adding Vitae Group's São Paulo brokerage team, expanding footprint.
data.description: On January 15, 2026, TechAssure, a global network of insurance brokers focused on intricate and evolving risks, expanded its presence in Latin America by incorporating the São Paulo brokerage team from Vitae Group. This move bolsters TechAssure's operations in the region and demonstrates its commitment to growth and service. Vitae Group, known for its strong presence in São Paulo, brings a wealth of experience and expertise to TechAssure, enhancing the network's capabilities in serving clients in Latin America. The partnership aims to capitalize on the burgeoning insurance market in the region and provide innovative solutions to clients.

data.title: Niagen Bioscience partners with Truemed to allow HSA and FSA use for purchasing Tru Niagen®, top NAD+ supplement in U.S.
data.description: Niagen Bioscience, Inc. (NASDAQ: NAGE), a leading expert on NAD+ (nicotinamide adenine dinucleotide) and healthy aging, has collaborated with Truemed to offer eligible customers the opportunity to buy Tru Niagen®, the top NAD+ supplement in the U.S.*, on their direct-to-consumer platform, www.truniagen.com. This partnership allows customers to use Health Savings Account (HSA) and Flexible Spending Account (FSA) funds for purchases. This strategic move aims to make the acclaimed supplement more accessible to consumers, leveraging the growing market demand for NAD+ products.
Fed's Goolsbee: Services inflation not yet under control.
